# `nise store repair`

- **Usage**: `nise store repair [FLAGS]`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/store/repair.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/store/repair.rs)

Repair explicit nise store problems

## Flags

### `-J --json`

Output JSON

### `-n --dry-run`

Do not actually change anything

### `--remove-broken-refs`

Remove broken compatibility install-ref manifests
